channel.title: Go Humble! RSS SOFTWARE
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle software bundles!

item.title: Ultimate Stylized Bundle by SICS Games
item.content:encoded: Toon-up your personal asset library with an injection of pure fun! We’ve teamed up with SICS Games on a unique cartoon-style bundle filled with vibrant color, fantastic designs, and easy-to-use UIs that fit seamlessly into whatever project you’re working on. Dive headfirst into new genres with hit asset packs like Toon Nature Assets, Toon Deserted Temples, Toon Adventure Island, and Toon Enchanted Meadow before it’s too late. Bring joy and exuberance to your next project with stylized toon assets today and help support No Kid Hungry.

item.title: Soundsnap 1,000 Sound Effects Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with a little help from the pros at Soundsnap. Unlock versatile, exclusive libraries for editors, sound designers, and game audio professionals. Explore a variety of instruments, genres, and languages, from hard-rockin’ riffs to the elegance of world-renowned strings. Get the Hollywood-quality assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support Little Free Library with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before August 7th, 2027.

item.title: The 2026 AWS, Azure, CompTIA Cloud Certification & Practice Exam Bundle
item.description: The right certification for any system
item.content:encoded: A new career is only a test or two away—our 2026 AWS, CompTIA, Cloud Certification & Practice Exam Bundle has everything you need to prepare and succeed! Choose from a variety of courses like AWS Certified Developer - Associate (DVA-C02): Prep & Pass, AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02): Prep & Pass, and Microsoft Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-305): Prep & Pass that sharpen your skills and test your knowledge retention! Ace your certification exams and help support Alzheimer's Research UK with your purchase!

item.title: The Ultimate iOS Development Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Master the skills you need to succeed in coding and app development with our latest Software Bundle by Packt. Learn the latest techniques being used across the industry with expert-led curricula like Apple Intelligence for Masterminds, SwiftUI iOS 18 Animations - Transform Code into Motion, and Deep Dive iOS 18 & SwiftUI 6, and watch your install base grow! Don’t let this opportunity to sharpen your digital skill set pass you by—pay what you want for a curated collection of learning courses today and help support charity: water when you shop with Humble Bundle.

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before August 3rd, 2027.

item.title: Uncharted Frontiers Environment Pack
item.description: Create bold new frontiers with over 400 assets!
item.content:encoded:
Explore mythic worlds, hidden islands, rugged outposts, futuristic cities, and deep space environments with the Uncharted Frontiers Environment Pack by KitBash3D. With a versatile mix of detailed Kits, vehicles, and worldbuilding assets, this bundle gives artists everything they need to craft cinematic scenes across fantasy, adventure, and sci-fi. Fully customizable and built for speed, these assets are designed to fit seamlessly into your workflow. Compatible with Blender, Unreal, Unity, Maya, and more.

Keys Expire. Please redeem before August 3rd, 2027.

item.title: Cosmos Eclipse Game Dev Assets & Tools bundle (Unreal + Unity + Godot)
item.content:encoded:
Unleash your creative potential and bring your imagination to life like never before with a curated selection of premium 3D assets for Unity and Unreal Engine! Design your own take on the Big Apple with the 1950s NYC Megapack, quarter your forces within realistic fortifications with the Military Base Megapack, or add lived-in grit and character to your old-time titles with the Medieval Village Megapack. The savings don’t stop there—grab this massive 70+ pack bundle and unlock a 1-month subscription to Leartes’ Cosmos collection! Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support our furry friends at Canine Companions!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before July 1st, 2027.

item.title: Freedom to Create with COREL Graphics Suite 2025
item.content:encoded:
Feel like your graphic design projects could use a little more pizzazz? Take your art to the next level with the 2025 edition of CorelDRAW Graphics Suite—professional quality graphic design software with all the bells and whistles. For a massive discount you’ll get everything this CorelDRAW suite has to offer, from vector illustration software, image processing, font and layout managers, and more! Whether you’re creating your own art pieces or designing for a brand, these programs will help you bring your ideas to life and give them energy and style. You won’t find a deal this good for software this essential anywhere else, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support Extra Life charity through Children’s Miracle Network Hospitals with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 31st, 2027. Permanent Perpetual License

item.title: Learn to Make Games in Unity 2026 Bundle
item.description: Learn to make games with Unity
item.content:encoded:
Take your first steps into game development with one of the world’s most popular game engines, Unity. Whether you’re completely new to coding and game creation or ready to build bigger and more advanced projects, this bundle gives you the tools to grow your skills through hands-on learning. Start with beginner-friendly courses like Create Your First 2D Game in Unity and Create Your First 3D Game in Unity, then continue into larger projects like Complete Action RPG, Farming RPG, Tower Defense, and Construct a First Person Shooter. Along the way, you’ll learn C# programming, game systems, debugging, optimization, multiplayer, VR, and more. Pay what you want for a complete Unity learning bundle that can help turn your passion for games into real development skills and help support Alzheimer's Research UK with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 30th, 2027.

item.title: The Complete Claude AI for Blender Bundle
item.description: Clear your calendar with Claude AI
item.content:encoded:
Save development time, money, and sweat equity with The Complete Claude AI for Blender Bundle. Design unique characters, dynamic environments, and more with this curated 15+ course library. Led by AI Box Modeling with Blender in Claude Code and Digital Sculpting Basics with Blender in Claude Code, this bundle has everything you need to implement Claude AI into fundamental development processes with minimal friction. Reduce your development cycle with leading AI tools today, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 29th, 2027.

item.title: Game Audio Collection - Access to over 300,000 music tracks and sound effects
item.description: A massive, 300,000+ audio asset bundle awaits!
item.content:encoded:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game for a price you choose with three unique asset bundle options from the pros at Audio Hero. Highlights from this gigantic library of 300,000+ commercial-ready assets include themed voice packs for a variety of ages, realistic animal sounds, and more, alongside curated genre-specific tunes! Explore a variety of genres, from Latin to jazz and everything in between. Each tier unlocks additional assets—get the raw tools you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support Children's Miracle Network Hospitals with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before July 27nd, 2027.

item.title: VFX Master-Bundle For Unreal
item.description: Discover the very best in VFX
item.content:encoded:
Crank up the volume on your next game or video with the VFX Master-Bundle for Unreal Engine. This gigantic library of high-quality assets from VRhinoFX gives you the dynamic VFX effects you need to add Hollywood-quality polish to your creative projects. Cast a charm on your players with the powerful RPG - Magic VFX collection, which features Holy Light, Blood, Fire, Poison, Darkness, and Lightning—pay what you want for realistic magical explosions and help support Make-A-Wish, too!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before June 5th, 2027.

item.title: Complete Character Creation for Games
item.description: Bring characters to life in Blender
item.content:encoded:
Dying to design your own epic game but have no idea where to begin? Been poking around in Blender but haven’t figured out all the tips and tricks? This bundle of Blender software courses will have you creating awesome boss fights and unique characters like you’ve been doing it for years! Learn the basics of character creation with courses on 3D, anime, and even low-poly characters! Bring them to life with comprehensive guides on animation and rigging! Let your imagination run wild sculpting orcs, dragons, mechs, and more! Get hours of resources and advice about all the details of game creation for the low price of your choosing, and support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 23rd, 2027.

item.title: IT & AI: 500+ Certification Exams
item.content:encoded:
Don’t stress that upcoming test; get the expert-level prep courses you need to dominate the CompTIA exams with our latest bundle from the industry leaders at Mammoth Club! Ace your AWS, NVIDIA, Linux, and CompTIA certifications with this massive library of more than 500 practice exams and supplemental materials. Plus, your purchase includes the Machine Learning & AI Certification Foundations collection. Pay what you want for elite learning and help support the Python Software Foundation with your purchase!
Keys Expire. Please redeem before July 30th, 2027.

item.title: Clip Studio Creativity Collection: Paint, Draw & Animate
item.content:encoded:
Design characters, create worlds, and tell infinite stories with this bundle of Clip Studio art and animation software! This bundle includes a 12-month license to Clip Studio Paint Pro Version 5.0, 2D animation program Moho Debut 12.5, Ultimate 3D Models Pack, 3D Poses, and Brush Packs for Clip Studio Paint, and more! Paint your digital artwork, design your comic, and put your stories in motion with this library of art and animation programs! Get all of these and more at the price of your choosing, and support classrooms in need with DonorsChoose with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before July 22nd, 2027.

item.title: World Builders: Americana
item.description: Create a slice of American life
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate the 250th birthday of the United States by adding a massive collection of A1 game assets to your personal library! Pay what you want for the World Builders: Americana Bundle and drop your players into a sinisterly simple suburban hellscape or a haunting hospital perfect for high-stakes sieges. Unlock 75+ themed asset packs like Meridian 1988: Captain Jimmy's Seafood - Modular Environment (VOL 6) and Meridian 1988: Genie Service Station - Modular Environment (VOL 16), and add detailed retro realism to your next project! As always, a portion of your purchase helps support the Forest School Foundation.

Keys Expire. Please redeem before December 21, 2027.

item.title: LIFETIME ACCESS CREATOR
item.content:encoded: Unlock a universe of professional sound effects—and keep it forever with the Lifetime Access Creator Bundle by Noise Alchemy! Perfect for game developers, film composers, content creators, and sound designers, this comprehensive SFX library offers 120+ handcrafted audio assets. Choose from three unique tiers that offer the perfect fit for any budget. Tier 1 gives you instant access to the bundle for 24 hours, Tier 2 gives you a full 30 days to explore the entire platform, and Tier 3 unlocks everything—for life. We’re talking permanent, unlimited access to the entire platform! Pay what you want for raw, flexible materials ready to be transformed into your next great audio project and help support Music Will with your purchase.

item.title: Game Development - Mega Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Kick off your summer learning program with the latest Game Development Mega Bundle by Packt! Unlock helpful tools that speed up your dev cycle with Procedural Weapon Generation with Blender 4.4 and Procedural Maze Building - Unity 6 and Blender Compatible. Gear up for development combat with Unity Game Creation Bootcamp - Unity 6 Compatible and Blender 5 Project Based Bootcamp - 40+ Hands-On Mini Projects, and tackle your next project with the firepower you need to succeed. Unlock the assets, tools, and courses you need to elevate your game, and help support the Girls Make Games Scholarship Fund with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 13, 2027.

item.title: The All-in-One Unreal & Unity GameDev Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Build game environments with ease when you pay what you want for The All-in-One Unreal & Unity GameDev Bundle! Unleash your creativity with a wide range of asset packs that cater to any scenario imaginable—set a dark and mysterious scene with the Cappadocia Anatolian Cave Hotel Environment pack, the Sci-Fi Populate Environment pack, The Lords' Mansion pack, and more. Save big on cyberpunk cityscapes, Japanese shopping malls, and beyond—plus, your purchase helps support the Make-A-Wish Foundation!

Keys expire. Please redeem your Fab keys before July 6th, 2027, and your Unity keys before June 30th, 2027.

item.title: Creature and Character Creation Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Bring monstrosities, blood-dripping creatures, and ghastly ghouls to life with a curated bundle of assets designed to get your players’ hearts pumping! Pay what you want for hundreds of specialized asset packs that work seamlessly with your preferred creation platforms, such as VDM Blender and ZBrush, including Faceit: Facial Expressions and Performance Capture and Base Mesh Mega Pack 3D Models - Human, Anime & Cartoon Animals. Plus, your purchase includes 44 ears, 44 teeth, 44 noses, and much, much more. Create amazing monsters before it’s too late, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before October 31, 2026.

item.title: The Complete Unity AI Bundle
item.description: Discover what’s possible with Unity AI
item.content:encoded:
Pay what you want to learn how to use Unity AI, the ultimate AI assistant from the pros at Mammoth Club. Unity AI is your agentic assistant—editor-integrated, project-aware, and designed to streamline your workflows. It’s also your AI gateway, connecting directly to your models and tools to maximize performance, security, and control, while serving as your bridge to Unity from your IDE or preferred application. Highlighted by lessons like Build a TikTok LIVE Game with Unity AI - Interactive Chat-Controlled Game, this curated collection offers everything you need to become an AI mastermind. Save time, money, and reduce operational friction with the Complete Unity AI Bundle before it’s gone!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 07, 2027.
